mnemonics: To remember the key components of ML testing: EAT (Evaluate, Assess, Test) your model to ensure it's healthy.
keyPoints: Testing evaluates model performance on unseen data (test set).
Assessment involves metrics like accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score.
The goal is to detect overfitting and ensure generalization to real-world data.
commonMistakes: Testing on the training data, which gives a falsely high performance.
Using the test set to tune model parameters, which contaminates the test set.
Ignoring data leakage, where information from the test set inadvertently influences the training process.
